title: galium laevigatum var. genuinum
intro: Galium laevigatum var. genuinum is a variety of the smooth bedstraw plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and combating bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Galium laevigatum var. genuinum include its potential to aid in the healing of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Galium laevigatum var. genuinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for a range of health issues.
